allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Unity multiplayer kitchen game using Netcode for GameObjects *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: ground drop with server-authoritative physics for KitchenObj *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: add BoxCollider in EnsurePhysicsComponents for ground physics *)
Bash(git commit -m 'security: add server-side validation to DropObjServerRpc and PickupObjServerRpc *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: clear previous holder reference in SetFree to prevent stale state *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: singleton lifecycle errors during scene unload and disconnect *)
